hero.title: Partners in Health and Development
hero.subtitle: A national non-profit with over 30 years of experience improving the health and wellbeing of vulnerable and marginalized populations across Bangladesh.

hero.slide2Sub: Working with government, UN agencies and partners to deliver lasting impact.

impact.title: Three decades of measurable change
impact.subtitle: We don't just run programs — we strengthen the systems that sustain them.
impact.lead: From public health and humanitarian response to climate resilience and gender equality, our work is built on partnership, accountability and local capacity.
impact.b1: Trusted by government, UN agencies and global donors

stories.subtitle: News, success stories and field updates from across our programs.

stories.s2Excerpt: Coordinated relief reaching families displaced by flooding and cyclones.

stories.s3Excerpt: Building skills and institutions for sustainable local impact.

programs.title: What We Do
programs.subtitle: Six core areas through which we strengthen health and development outcomes across Bangladesh.

grant.title: Grant Management
grant.desc: Transparent grant management and financial oversight for donors and partners.
grant.long: We provide end-to-end grant management — from fund disbursement and compliance to reporting and audit — giving donors and partners full confidence that resources reach the communities they are intended for.

implementation.title: Program Implementation
implementation.desc: Designing and delivering impactful public health and development projects.
implementation.long: We design and deliver field programmes in health, climate resilience, livelihoods and education — combining technical rigour with deep community engagement to produce measurable, lasting results.
implementation.a3: Coordination with government and local actors

technical.title: Technical Assistance
technical.desc: Specialized technical support to partner organizations and government bodies.
technical.long: We offer specialised technical assistance to government bodies, NGOs and development partners — strengthening systems, standards and strategies across the public health and development sector.

capacity.title: Capacity Development
capacity.desc: Training and institutional strengthening for sustainable local impact.
capacity.long: We build the skills and institutions that sustain change — training frontline workers, strengthening local organisations and embedding systems that outlast any single project.

academic.title: Academic Programme
academic.desc: Academic and educational initiatives advancing public health knowledge.
academic.long: We advance public health knowledge through academic partnerships, applied research and educational initiatives that connect evidence with practice for the next generation of health professionals.

humanitarian.title: Humanitarian Response
humanitarian.desc: Rapid, coordinated emergency response for crisis-affected communities.
humanitarian.long: When disasters strike, we respond fast — delivering anticipatory action, emergency cash, shelter and WASH to crisis-affected communities, with a focus on the most vulnerable.

about.title: Who We Are
about.subtitle: Strengthening management for a healthier Bangladesh
about.lead: Partners in Health and Development (PHD) is a national non-profit development organization in Bangladesh with over 30 years of experience.
about.body: We work in public health, humanitarian response, climate resilience, gender equality, research, capacity development, and partnership management. PHD works closely with government institutions, UN agencies, development partners, NGOs, and communities to improve the health and wellbeing of vulnerable and marginalized populations across Bangladesh.
about.mission: To improve the health and wellbeing of vulnerable and marginalized populations by strengthening management and building local capacity.
about.vision: A Bangladesh where every community has equitable access to quality health and development services.
about.values: Integrity, accountability, equity, partnership, and a relentless focus on impact.

where.title: Where We Work
where.subtitle: Reaching vulnerable and marginalized communities across Bangladesh.
where.body: From the coastal climate-vulnerable belt to remote rural districts and urban informal settlements, our programs span the country in partnership with local and national stakeholders.
where.reachSubtitle: Working across all eight divisions of Bangladesh.

news.title: News & Media
news.subtitle: Latest updates, success stories, and announcements from across our programs.
news.empty: Stories and updates will appear here soon.

approach.title: How we create lasting impact
approach.subtitle: A proven, partnership-driven approach — from understanding needs to sustaining results.
approach.s1Desc: We start with communities, partners and evidence to understand real needs.
approach.s2Desc: We co-design solutions with local stakeholders and government.
approach.s3Desc: We deliver programs while building local capacity and systems.
approach.s4Desc: We measure impact and hand over ownership for lasting change.
approach.focusSubtitle: Our work spans the issues that matter most to vulnerable communities.

getInvolved.subtitle: Partner with us, join our team, or collaborate as a consultant.
getInvolved.careersDesc: Explore current openings and grow your career with PHD.
getInvolved.consultingDesc: Collaborate with us as an individual consultant or firm.
getInvolved.partnershipDesc: Build strategic partnerships to expand our shared impact.
getInvolved.whySubtitle: Three decades of trusted, accountable, community-led development.
getInvolved.w1Desc: Proven track record across public health and humanitarian work.
getInvolved.w2Desc: Working with government, UN agencies and global donors.
getInvolved.w3Desc: Transparent grant and financial management you can rely on.
getInvolved.w4Desc: Community-led solutions built to last beyond every project.

cta.title: Let's build healthier communities together
cta.subtitle: Partner with PHD to strengthen health and development across Bangladesh.

board.title: Our Board
board.subtitle: The governing body that safeguards PHD's mission, integrity and accountability.
board.lead: PHD is governed by an independent Board of Directors that provides strategic direction, financial oversight and a relentless commitment to transparency and good governance.

team.title: Senior Management Team
team.subtitle: The leaders translating strategy into impact across Bangladesh.
team.lead: Our senior management team brings together decades of experience in public health, humanitarian response, finance and accountability to lead PHD's day-to-day work.

partnersPage.title: Our Development Partners
partnersPage.subtitle: We deliver together — with the institutions that fund, guide and strengthen our work.
partnersPage.lead: PHD works in partnership with UN agencies, bilateral and government donors, multilateral banks and international foundations. These relationships are built on trust, transparency and shared accountability for results.
partnersPage.ctaBody: Explore how your institution can collaborate with PHD to reach Bangladesh's most vulnerable communities.

careersPage.title: Careers at PHD
careersPage.subtitle: Do the work that matters most.
careersPage.lead: PHD is a nationwide team pairing technical excellence with a deep respect for the communities we serve. Explore current openings and grow your career with us.
careersPage.p1Desc: Your work reaches communities most others never reach.
careersPage.p2Desc: Structured learning, mentoring and clear progression.
careersPage.vacanciesSubtitle: Open positions across our programmes and operations.
careersPage.internDesc: Hands-on experience across programmes, MEAL, finance and communications.
careersPage.volunteerDesc: Lend your skills to community mobilisation and emergency response.
careersPage.talentDesc: Not seeing the right role? Register your profile for future openings.
careersPage.procurementSubtitle: Open tenders, RFQs and requests for proposals.
careersPage.eoe: PHD is an equal-opportunity employer committed to safeguarding and zero tolerance of sexual exploitation, abuse and harassment. All offers are subject to reference and background checks.

knowledge.title: Knowledge Hub
knowledge.subtitle: Evidence, openly shared.
knowledge.lead: Research, evaluations, policy briefs and reports from across PHD's programmes — because what we learn belongs to the whole sector.

transparency.title: Transparency & Accountability
transparency.subtitle: Open books. Open feedback. Open to scrutiny.
transparency.lead: Accountability isn't a department at PHD — it's a design principle. Here are the documents, policies and channels that let anyone hold us to account.
transparency.financialsSubtitle: Where the money comes from — and goes.
transparency.policiesSubtitle: The standards we hold ourselves to.
transparency.complaintsBody: Anyone — a community member, partner, supplier or member of staff — can raise a concern about PHD's conduct. Reports can be made anonymously and are handled independently, without retaliation.
transparency.chPersonVal: Help desks at every field site

storiesPage.title: Success Stories
storiesPage.subtitle: Change, in the words of the people who live it.
storiesPage.lead: Behind every statistic is a person. These are some of the people whose lives have changed through PHD's programmes — told, wherever possible, in their own words.

caseStudies.title: Case Studies
caseStudies.subtitle: How our approach works — from challenge to result.
caseStudies.lead: A closer look at how PHD designs and delivers programmes that produce measurable, lasting change for vulnerable communities.

footer.about: Partners in Health and Development (PHD) — improving health through strengthening management.
